meaning: n.小鬼,小淘气,顽童vt.加强,补充,装翅膀
examples: What is that to thee, you ugly imp?
Import (imp) and export (exp) can be used to perform logical import and export.
One of the biggest annoyances with new WiFi devices is getting them connected to your secure network, so Imp makes this fast and easy.
Based on that glamorous imp Diana Ross, she allows the Berry Gordy figure (Jamie Foxx) to dress her up as a swank mannequin but finally breaks free.
